summary: Anonymous user live game out of market - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is anonymous
AND scheduled/in-progress games are available outside of the users current location/market

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a scheduled/in-progress game tile
steps.result:
THEN the game matchup displays in the header
AND the following title text displays "[MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] Subscription Required" (subject to change via Content Restrictions)
AND the following description text displays "You need an active [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] subscription to view this game. [MLB.TV|http://MLB.TV] Single Team subscribers, click your team’s broadcast. New users please visit [www.mlb.com/|http://www.mlb.com/]<device_platform> to purchase." (subject to change via Content Restrictions)
AND a "Subscribe" button displays with focus below "Full Game Access"
AND text and buttons are center justified
